queries.question: What cruise ship customers went to a dance class and what resort customers also went to one?
queries.sql:
SELECT Customers.Name 
FROM Customers
WHERE (Customers.Vacation_Option = "Cruise Ship" OR Customers.Vacation_Option = "All-Inclusive Resort") AND Customers.Activities = "Dance Class"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?customers a :Customers .
  ?customers p:name ?name .
  ?customers p:Vacation_Option ?vacation_option_w .
  ?customers p:Vacation_Option ?vacation_option_w2 .
  ?customers p:Activities ?activities_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?vacation_option_w) = "Cruise Ship" || STR(?vacation_option_w2) = "All-Inclusive Resort")) && STR(?activities_w) = "Dance Class"))
}

queries.question: List all cruise ship customers and also list resort customers that went to a dance class.
queries.sql:
SELECT Customers.Name 
FROM Customers
WHERE Customers.Vacation_Option = "Cruise Ship" OR Customers.Vacation_Option = "All-Inclusive Resort" AND Customers.Activities = "Dance Class"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?customers a :Customers .
  ?customers p:name ?name .
  ?customers p:Vacation_Option ?vacation_option_w .
  ?customers p:Vacation_Option ?vacation_option_w2 .
  ?customers p:Activities ?activities_w .
  FILTER((STR(?vacation_option_w) = "Cruise Ship" || (STR(?vacation_option_w2) = "All-Inclusive Resort" && STR(?activities_w) = "Dance Class")))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show cruise ship customers and resort customers that went to a dance class.
